_doc: Calibrated selectors for skills/square_tips/dashboard_backend.py against app.squareup.com Sales Summary (Beta). Each entry: stable selector + last_verified date + notes on UI fragility.
verified_by: Cursor AI agent driving user-playwright MCP, fresh from-scratch flow

continue_button.notes: After typing email, click to advance to password page

password_input.notes: Step 2; appears after Continue. Email field is removed from DOM.

export_trigger_button.fallback_role_query: generic with aria-label Export, find inner button
export_trigger_button.notes: Icon-only button (down-arrow into tray) in top-right of report header. No aria-label on the button itself; the wrapping generic has aria-label=Export. Coords are a last-resort fallback if the role-based selector breaks.

export_confirm_button.notes: Inside the Export popover that opens after clicking export_trigger_button. Has visible 'Export' text and an icon.

report_type_pill.notes: Text content: 'Report type Summary' or 'Report type Days' depending on current setting. Click opens the report-type slide-out panel.

report_type_panel.notes: Two listboxes: 'Summaries' (Summary, Summary by hour, Summary by day) and 'Individual increments' (Hours, Days, Weeks, Months). For BHAGA daily tip pulls, always pick Days under Individual increments.

date_range_pill.notes: TODO 2026-04-19: explicit date picker not yet calibrated. For now, navigate by Previous/Next 7-day buttons from the current default range. Date range persists across sessions for the same Square account.

tips_row_in_table.notes: DOM verification — row has 'Tips' label, an order count button, and an amount cell. Used for sanity check, not the primary data source (CSV is).

header_in_days_mode: First column header: 'Sales summary - Daily\nAll day (12:00 AM-11:59 PM CT)'
header_in_summary_mode: First column header: 'Sales summary - Summary\nAll day (12:00 AM-11:59 PM CT)'
csv_format.tips_row: Row label = 'Tips'; values are dollar strings ('$57.51', '$0.00', '($36.75)' for negative)
csv_format.transactions_row: Row label = 'Tips transactions' — daily order counts per day
